productName: SF TWI FY - 2.5G - Swirly Temple - Cherry Lime - HYB - CR
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Swirly Temple supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a tart, crisp lime flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
